---
title: "Homework template"
subtitle: "class and assignment"
author: "your name"
description: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%F')`"
title-block-banner: "#d2d2d2"
format: 
  html:
      linkcolor: "#086C35"
      toc: true
      toc-title: "Problems and Exercises"
      embed-resources: true
      theme: cosmo
      link-external-newwindow: true
---

# Question 1

Describe the problem set here

### Answer 1

Answer the question here. 

Write up your code if necessary. 

```{r}
#| label: answer 1

1 + 3

```


# Question 2

Describe question 2 here. 

## Part A

This is a 2 part question. This is the first part. 

## Answer 2 A

Here is the answer to part A. 

## Part B

Here is the second part of the question. 

## Answer 2 B

Here is the anser to part B. 

```{r}
#| label: ansewr 2b

2 + 2
```
